backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing IELTS test management backend with CRUD operations for tests and student responses, authentication using hardcoded credentials (username: 'Sayem Ahtesham', password: 'sayem_web_deployment'), and automated scoring logic for multiple question types with IELTS band estimation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to update frontend authentication hook to use hardcoded credentials 'Sayem Ahtesham' and 'sayem_web_deployment', referencing test ID REQ-16 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing the React application structure with authentication, test management, student response handling, and UI components using shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark modes, including primary colors, borders, backgrounds, and chart colors for the application theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'IELTS Test Management by Sayem' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component managing global state for view modes (welcome, test, results, responses), coordinating between TestManagementPanel and RightPanelContainer, with header displaying 'IELTS Test Management by Sayem' and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication modal dialog component that accepts username and password inputs, validates credentials via onLogin callback prop, displays error messages on failure, and triggers onSuccess callback on successful authentication.
Modal dialog for creating new tests that receives AuthCredentials prop from parent, uses useTestForm hook for form state management, validates input, converts form data to backend format, and calls useCreateTest mutation with credentials.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying 'Powered By Sayem Ahtesham' text centered at the bottom of the page.
A form component for building individual test questions with configurable question types (multiple choice, true/false, short answer, etc.), options management, and marks allocation. Supports different question types based on test type (writing vs. reading).
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Displays detailed view of a student's test response including student info, scores, IELTS band, timing, and individual question answers with correct/incorrect indicators. Includes back navigation and PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: A table-based viewer for all student responses with search functionality, displaying student names, batch numbers, test titles, scores, and IELTS bands. Supports response deletion and navigation to detailed response view.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Shows test results after completion with score breakdown, IELTS band, accuracy percentage, time taken, and toggleable correct answers display. Provides navigation back to home screen.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: Container component that conditionally renders TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome screen based on the current app state and view mode.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: A modal dialog that collects student name and batch number before allowing test access. Prevents dismissal until information is provided.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking interface with student registration, question navigation, timer display, answer collection, and test submission. Manages test progress and coordinates between registration, questions, and submission.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Displays a panel for managing tests with search, filtering by test type, and buttons to create new tests or view responses. Requires authentication to create tests and shows a list of all available tests with selection capability.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders individual test questions with appropriate input controls based on question type (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short answer, long answer, etc.). Handles answer input and updates through callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the ICP actor instance with authentication, creating either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on Internet Identity. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple session-based authentication with hardcoded credentials stored in sessionStorage. Exposes login, logout, and credential retrieval functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, managing identity state, login flow, and session persistence. Provides hooks for accessing identity and authentication status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD operations for tests and student responses. Uses the actor from useActor and manages query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Filters student responses by student name based on a search term. Returns memoized filtered results.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Manages test filtering state and logic, filtering tests by title search term and test type. Returns filtered results and state setters.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Manages form state for creating/editing tests including questions, validation, and conversion between form data and backend Test type. Provides methods to add/remove/update questions and reset the form.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Custom React hook that handles test submission logic, calculates scores and IELTS band estimates (9.0 to 5.0 based on correct answers), and creates student responses via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Custom React hook providing timer functionality with start, pause, and reset controls, tracking elapsed seconds and formatting time as MM:SS.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom colors (using OKLCH), container settings, border radius variables, shadows, and keyframe animations for accordions and fades.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing an IELTS test management system with features for creating/taking tests, automatic scoring, band estimation, and authentication (username: 'Sayem Ahtesham').
